victim.value: Harry, a business partner in a disputed joint venture who may have died in a car crash
victim.quote: The car left the road and was, according to the laws of physics, in a position of no return.

closed_world.value: Mountain road during nighttime with thick fog
closed_world.quote: It's getting dark, the fog's thick, and this road is a nightmare.

red_herring.value: High-speed car crash staged to look like reckless driving accident when Harry was actually murdered or sabotaged
red_herring.quote: he car went straight. It did not stop but continued at high speed

clue_fairness.value: Tourist witnesses observe the crash details - car going too far right instead of left for the curve
clue_fairness.quote: the car was going too far to the right when it should be either slowing down or sticking to the left

social_world.value: Corporate power structure with Harry controlling board through nominees, excluding minority partner Randolph
social_world.quote: the board consists completely of your nominees, and I can't make my voice heard at all

_meta.title: ebook lubos borik human source code
